understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate through a grid-based level, matching a goal cell's shape, color, and rotation requirements by stepping on modifier tiles, then stepping onto the goal cell to complete it. All goals in a level had to be completed to advance, with the ultimate aim of finishing all levels and winning the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Stamina depletes by 1 per move; reaching 0 costs a life and resets stamina to max. Losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement (listed as 'blocked_directions'). Shape, color, and rotation modifiers cycle the piece's attributes when stepped on. A goal activates only when the carried piece matches all three requirements exactly. Once activated, stepping on the goal cell completes it. The grid coordinate system uses [x, y] with MOVE_NORTH decreasing y, MOVE_SOUTH increasing y, MOVE_EAST increasing x, and MOVE_WEST decreasing x.

history.summary: Reached 1 level(s) after 71 turns.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate through a grid-based level, matching a goal cell's shape, color, and rotation requirements by stepping on modifier tiles, then stepping onto the goal cell to complete it. All goals in a level had to be completed to advance, with the ultimate aim of finishing all levels and winning the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Stamina depletes by 1 per move; reaching 0 costs a life and resets stamina to max. Losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement (listed as 'blocked_directions'). Shape, color, and rotation modifiers cycle the piece's attributes when stepped on. A goal activates only when the carried piece matches all three requirements exactly. Once activated, stepping on the goal cell completes it. The grid coordinate system uses [x, y] with MOVE_NORTH decreasing y, MOVE_SOUTH increasing y, MOVE_EAST increasing x, and MOVE_WEST decreasing x.
